EasySaveDocs
Table of Contents

Class SaveSpace

Namespace
ProjetEasySave.Model
Assembly
EasySaveWPF.dll

Represents a configured backup job, managing its properties, associated tasks, and execution state. Acts as an observer to track changes from its underlying SaveTask instances.

public class SaveSpace : SaveTaskObserver
Inheritance
object
SaveSpace
Implements
SaveTaskObserver
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Constructors

SaveSpace(string, string, string, string, List<string>, SemaphoreSlim, string)

Initializes a new instance of the SaveSpace class.

public SaveSpace(string name, string sourcePath, string destinationPath, string typeSave, List<string> priorityExt, SemaphoreSlim bigFileSemaphore, string completeSavePath = "")

Parameters

name string

The designated name of the backup job.

sourcePath string

The absolute path of the directory to back up.

destinationPath string

The absolute path where the backup will be saved.

typeSave string

The strategy type for the backup ("complete" or "differential").

priorityExt List<string>

A list of file extensions that should be processed first.

bigFileSemaphore SemaphoreSlim

A semaphore used to control concurrent large file transfers.

completeSavePath string

The reference path to a full backup (required if using a differential strategy).

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when an unsupported save strategy type is provided.

Methods

Pause()

Suspends the active backup process. The process will block until Play() is called.

public void Pause()

Play()

Resumes the backup process if it was previously paused.

public void Play()

Stop()

Cancels the ongoing backup operation permanently.

public void Stop()

executeSaveAsync()

Asynchronously executes all underlying backup tasks configured for this save space.

public Task<bool> executeSaveAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

A task that represents the asynchronous operation. Returns true if completed successfully; otherwise, false.

getCompleteSavePath()

Gets the reference path utilized for complete saves when processing a differential backup.

public string getCompleteSavePath()

Returns

string

The path to the complete backup, or an empty string if not applicable.

getDestinationPath()

Gets the configured destination directory path.

public string getDestinationPath()

Returns

string

The absolute path to the destination directory.

getName()

Gets the designated name of the save space.

public string getName()

Returns

string

The name of the save space.

getPriorityExt()

Gets the list of priority file extensions.

public List<string> getPriorityExt()

Returns

List<string>

A list of file extension strings.

getSourcePath()

Gets the configured source directory path.

public string getSourcePath()

Returns

string

The absolute path to the source directory.

getTaskStates()

Gets the collection of current states for all managed tasks.

public List<SaveTaskState> getTaskStates()

Returns

List<SaveTaskState>

A list containing the SaveTaskState values.

getTypeSave()

Gets the defined backup strategy type.

public string getTypeSave()

Returns

string

The string representation of the backup strategy (e.g., "complete" or "differential").

onSaveTaskStateChanged(SaveTask, SaveTaskState)

Handles state change notifications emitted by the underlying SaveTask instances. Logs the transition and notifies the UI layer.

public SaveTaskState onSaveTaskStateChanged(SaveTask task, SaveTaskState newState)

Parameters

task SaveTask

The task that triggered the state change.

newState SaveTaskState

The newly applied state.

Returns

SaveTaskState

The confirmed new state.

setDestinationPath(string)

Sets the destination directory path.

public void setDestinationPath(string destinationPath)

Parameters

destinationPath string

The new absolute path to the destination directory.

setName(string)

Sets the designated name of the save space.

public void setName(string name)

Parameters

name string

The new name to apply.

setPriorityExt(string)

Parses and sets the priority file extensions from a comma-separated string.

public void setPriorityExt(string priorityExt)

Parameters

priorityExt string

A comma-separated string of extensions (e.g., ".txt,.docx").

setSourcePath(string)

Sets the source directory path.

public void setSourcePath(string sourcePath)

Parameters

sourcePath string

The new absolute path to the source directory.

setTypeSave(string)

Modifies the backup strategy type and reinitializes the underlying tasks.

public void setTypeSave(string typeSave)

Parameters

typeSave string

The new strategy type ("complete" or "differential").

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when an invalid strategy type is provided.

Events

ProgressChanged

Event triggered when the completion percentage or the current processing file changes.

public event Action<int, string>? ProgressChanged

Event Type

Action<int, string>

SaveTaskStateChanged

Event triggered whenever the state of the save space transitions (e.g., from RUNNING to PAUSED).

public event EventHandler? SaveTaskStateChanged

Event Type

EventHandler
